description_long: This is a tall, slender ceramic vase with a single curved handle extending from the neck to the shoulder. The body is predominantly white with intricate black and terracotta painted motifs, including stylized floral and geometric patterns. The neck and base are finished in a matte black, contrasting with the natural terracotta color of the rim and foot. The upper shoulder features a band of black lines radiating outward, while the main body displays ornate shell-like and scrollwork designs. The handle is robust and dark, providing both functional grip and visual balance. The overall craftsmanship and decorative style evoke classical Greek pottery, making it a striking decorative piece.
description: A tall, slender ceramic vase with a single black handle, white body, and intricate black and terracotta painted motifs reminiscent of classical Greek pottery.
description_view_0: The vase is seen with its handle prominently on the left, showing the plain white body and the black neck and base.
description_view_1: This view highlights the ornate shell-like motifs and geometric patterns on the body, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_2: The decorative motifs are fully visible, including the central scrollwork and the detailed band around the shoulder.
description_view_3: The handle is now on the right, with the plain white body and a glimpse of the decorative motifs on the far side.
